questions.question: Explain the main difference between a process and a thread in an operating system context. Provide an example to support your answer.
What is the primary purpose of the context switch in process scheduling? Explain your answer using a simple diagram or flowchart.

A process is created with a high priority and a time slice of 2 seconds. If the process is unable to complete its task within the given time slice, the operating system will drop its privileges and switch to another process. Describe the implications of this scenario on process scheduling.
